name: Dave & Pam W.
text: Jeremiah replaced our entire roof after a hail storm and the experience was seamless. They handled everything with our insurance adjuster and the crew had us done in a day. Our neighbors have already asked for their number.

name: Sarah K.
text: We got three bids for new siding and windows. Jeremiah wasn't the cheapest but their installation quality was on a different level. Two years later everything still looks brand new and our heating bill dropped noticeably.

name: Mike R.
text: I manage several rental properties and have used Jeremiah on three different projects now. Consistent quality, show up when they say they will, and they always leave the site cleaner than they found it. That reliability is rare.

name: Tom & Linda H.
text: The free inspection caught storm damage on our roof we didn't even know was there. Jeremiah walked us through the whole process, worked directly with our insurance, and the roof looks incredible. We can't say enough good things.
